steps.title: Focus on subject matter
steps.content: The student wants to contrast what the two prints depict. The relevant notes say Salazar's print has an explicitly political point of view, while Shikongo's shows a tranquil everyday scene.

steps.title: Reject technique and date contrasts
steps.content: A and B focus on printmaking technique, not what the works depict. C contrasts the years the works were made, which does not address their subject matter. The answer is D.
